---
name: Translation Request
about: Request or contribute a new language translation
title: '[i18n] '
labels: 'i18n'
assignees: ''
---

## Language

Which language is this for? [e.g. Turkish, Portuguese, Japanese]

## Status

- [ ] I can provide the translation myself
- [ ] I need someone to translate this

## Translation Strings

If you're providing the translation, paste the translated strings here or in a PR.

You can find the translation strings in `src/app/page.tsx` inside the `translations` object.
